problem: Primary care access is limited with long wait times, and chronic pain conditions often go undiagnosed or poorly managed due to fragmented care and lack of 24/7 access to medical guidance.
solution: AI-powered primary care platform integrated with major health systems (Cedars-Sinai, Hartford HealthCare, Hackensack Meridian). Provides 24/7 access through AI Physician Mode that automates intake and provides clinical insights, with seamless integration to single medical records for comprehensive care including pain management.
